languages.text: "Ваша правда. Вон сержант Вукчик хоть и форму чинную нацепил, но из пустотной крысы солдата не выйдет. Так скажу: добро при нем держите ближе к телу".

traits.locale_text: "Ваша правда. Вон сержант Вукчик хоть и форму чинную нацепил, но из пустотной крысы солдата не выйдет. Так скажу: добро при нём держите ближе к телу".

languages.text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."
languages.original_text: "Ваша правда. Вон сержант Вукчик хоть и форму чинную нацепил, но из пустотной крысы солдата не выйдет. Так скажу: добро при нем держите ближе к телу".

traits.locale_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."
"You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."
"You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

languages.text: “您说得对。比如那个武克奇克军士。就算给虚空鼠套上制服，它也变不成士兵。我跟您说，要是碰上了武克奇克，值钱的东西可得看紧点。”
languages.original_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

traits.locale_text: “您说得对。比如那个武克奇克军士。就算给虚空鼠套上制服，它也变不成士兵。我跟您说，要是碰上了武克奇克，值钱的东西可得看紧点。”

languages.text: « Vous avez bien raison. Ce sergent Vukchik, par exemple. On peut donner un uniforme à n'importe quel rat du vide, mais ça suffit pas à en faire un soldat. Un bon conseil : quand Vukchik est dans le coin, veillez bien sur vos affaires. »
languages.original_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez bien raison. Ce sergent Vukchik, par exemple. On peut donner un uniforme à n'importe quel rat du vide, mais ça suffit pas à en faire un soldat. Un bon conseil : quand Vukchik est dans le coin, veillez bien sur vos affaires. »

languages.text: "Haklısınız. Şu Çavuş Vukchik mesela. Bir uçsuz faresine üniforma giydirmek onu asker yapmaz. Size şunu söyleyeyim: Vukchik buralardayken değerli eşyalarınızı gözünüzün önünden ayırmayın."
languages.original_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

traits.locale_text: "Haklısınız. Şu Çavuş Vukchik mesela. Bir uçsuz faresine üniforma giydirmek onu asker yapmaz. Size şunu söyleyeyim: Vukchik buralardayken değerli eşyalarınızı gözünüzün önünden ayırmayın."

languages.text: «Tiene razón. El sargento Vukchik, por ejemplo. Una rata del espacio no se convierte en soldado solo con vestir de uniforme. Se lo advierto: cuando Vukchik esté cerca, vigile bien sus pertenencias».
languages.original_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

traits.locale_text: «Tiene razón. El sargento Vukchik, por ejemplo. Una rata del espacio no se convierte en soldado solo con vestir de uniforme. Se lo advierto: cuando Vukchik esté cerca, vigile bien sus pertenencias».

languages.text: "Das stimmt. Dieser Sergeant Vukchik vor allem. Ihr könnt eine Leerenratte in eine Uniform stecken, aber das macht sie nicht zu einem Soldaten. Ich sag Euch was: Passt auf Eure Taschen auf, wenn Vukchik in der Nähe ist."
languages.original_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

traits.locale_text: "Das stimmt. Dieser Sergeant Vukchik vor allem. Ihr könnt eine Leerenratte in eine Uniform stecken, aber das macht sie nicht zu einem Soldaten. Ich sag Euch was: Passt auf Eure Taschen auf, wenn Vukchik in der Nähe ist."

languages.text: 「君も言っているように、そのヴクチック大尉なんかね。服を着せておれば兵士になれるわけじゃない。ヴクチック大尉がいたら、貴重品は身につけておけよ。」
languages.original_text: "You're right. That Sergeant Vukchik, for one. You can put a void rat in a uniform, but that doesn't make them a soldier. I'll tell you this: when Vukchik's around, keep your valuables close."

traits.locale_text: 「君も言っているように、そのヴクチック大尉なんかね。服を着せておれば兵士になれるわけじゃない。ヴクチック大尉がいたら、貴重品は身につけておけよ。」
